title: Chips
description: Chips component is a versatile UI element that offers an elegant and flexible way to display and manage small pieces of information or content. It supports prefixes and suffixes, text content, size adjustments, and customizable colors, making it an ideal tool for creating visually appealing and functional chip-based interfaces in Angular applications.

sections.title: Colors
sections.description: You can change chips colors to (primary, danger, warning, success, secondary, ghost).

sections.title: Sizes
sections.description: You can change chips sizes to ax-sm, ax-md, and ax-lg.

props.name: color
props.description: Defines the color scheme of the component. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Determines the appearance of the chips.

props.name: size
props.description: Specifies the size of the chips.

props.name: text
props.description: The text displayed on the chips.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when the color of the component changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look of the component changes.

events.name: sizeChange
events.description: Emitted when the size of the component changes.

events.name: textChange
events.description: Emitted when the text of the component changes.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)
